title: SOE Financial Recovery and Sustainability Plans
description: All SOEs under DPE oversight must submit credible financial recovery plans to the Department by 31 March 2024. Plans must include a path to financial sustainability within 5 years, debt reduction targets, and operational efficiency milestones.
affectedCompanies: South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited

title: Sovereign Guarantee Exposure Management
description: SOEs with sovereign-guaranteed debt must submit quarterly reports on debt service coverage, covenant compliance, and liquidity position. Any covenant breach must be reported to National Treasury within 5 business days.
affectedCompanies: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa

title: Operation Vulindlela — SOE Reform Milestones
description: SOEs must implement structural reforms as part of Operation Vulindlela. Eskom must complete unbundling into generation, transmission and distribution entities. Transnet must introduce private sector participation in port terminals and rail corridors.

title: Board Composition and Governance Standards
description: All SOE boards must comply with King IV governance requirements. Boards must have a minimum of 60% independent non-executive directors. Board effectiveness evaluations must be conducted annually and results reported to the shareholder.
affectedCompanies: South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited
Airports Company South Africa SOC Limited

title: Consequence Management for Irregular Expenditure
description: SOEs must implement consequence management for all irregular, fruitless and wasteful expenditure identified by the Auditor-General. Disciplinary proceedings must be finalised within 90 days of identification. Progress reports to be submitted quarterly.
affectedCompanies: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
South African Broadcasting Corporation SOC Limited

title: Denel Recapitalisation Conditions
description: Denel must meet specific operational and governance conditions attached to the R3.4 billion government recapitalisation. Conditions include regularising salary payments, implementing a credible business plan, and achieving specified revenue milestones.
